title:
PROMPT 018: Microphone вЂ” Recording Live
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1920px (9:16 Vertical)
DURATION: 3.0s | LOOP: Yes
SVG: Microphone (6 paths: capsule top, capsule bottom arc, body shaft, base stand, 2 arc soundwave paths flanking mic) вЂ” centered 540Г—880px, 90px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #0A0A0A (near black)
Mic capsule fill: #F8FAFC (near white)
Mic body stroke: #F8FAFC (3px)
Base stroke: #94A3B8 (grey)
Soundwave arcs stroke: #EF4444 (red, when recording)
Rec dot: #EF4444 (20px circle, pulsing, top-right of frame at 920Г—160px)
Rec text: "REC" in #EF4444, 22pt bold, beside dot at 950Г—157px

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Microphone in lower-center of frame (story format). Soundwave arcs flank mic body.
"REC" indicator top-right corner.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.0s loopable):
0вЂ“0.4s: Mic icon builds path by path (capsule в†’ shaft в†’ base, each draws in 0.15s stagger, stroke-dashoffset 100%в†’0%, ease-out).
0.4вЂ“0.7s: REC dot appears (scale 0 в†’ 1.0, spring). "REC" text fades in (0 в†’ 1.0).
0.7вЂ“3.0s (looping):
  - REC dot pulses (scale 1.0 в†’ 1.3 в†’ 1.0, every 0.8s, ease-in-out).
  - Soundwave arc 1 (inner, 50px radius) scales/fades out (scale 1.0 в†’ 1.4, opacity 1.0 в†’ 0, 0.6s cycle, ease-out).
  - Soundwave arc 2 (outer, 70px radius) same cycle, staggered 0.3s after arc 1.
  - Both arcs loop continuously.

EASING CURVES:
- Build-in: ease-out
- REC spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Pulse: ease-in-out
- Wave expand: ease-out
